LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF TR&A, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees Following Entry Of Judgment; P&A
Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael C. Miller, Esq. of the Law Offices of Michael C. Miller, Tel. 650.323.2003, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TR&A, INC.'s Motion For Attorneys Fees Following Entry Of Judgment is granted because no opposition was filed. Order and Amended Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MICHAEL MILLER, ESQ., LAW OFFICE OF MICHAEL MILLER, 650.323.2003; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TR&A, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
